text.message: I could ask the same question

Why would I give you a settle

how can you say insane request when it was a 2:1 to stop blue

if you hit 10 wheat i solo you, oj

If youre so afraid of blue
okay, my logical reaction is blocking you then
now youre not winning suddenly? lmao
